title: Empleurum unicapsularis
taxonomy: Empleurum unicapsularis is classified within the family Rutaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the citrus or rue family. This family includes various species of trees and shrubs, many of which are native to Asia and Australia. The Rutaceae family is part of the larger order Sapindales, which also includes the families Anacardiaceae and Burseraceae. Empleurum unicapsularis is native to Australia and is often found in coastal regions and dry woodlands. Its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Sapindales order.
uses: Empleurum unicapsularis, also known as the single-fruited riddell, is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties.
